suppress.notes: CVE-2022-31691 is a known false positive: Dependency-Check's CPE matcher pairs spring-boot-devtools with the broad VMware "spring_boot" / "spring_tools" CPEs, triggering on any Spring Boot version. Spring Boot devtools is declared here with scope=runtime and optional=true; it is NOT included in the repackaged production JAR (see pom.xml, spring-boot-maven-plugin excludes devtools by default). Reference: Spring Security Advisories have never assigned this CVE to devtools directly.
